# kemp_virtual_service (Data Source)

Reads a Kemp LoadMaster virtual service by its `Index`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "kemp_virtual_service" "existing" {
  id = "12"
}

output "existing_address" {
  value = data.kemp_virtual_service.existing.address
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) LoadMaster `Index` of the virtual service.

### Read-Only

- `address` (String)
- `bandwidth` (Number)
- `cert_files` (List of String)
- `check_port` (String)
- `check_type` (String)
- `check_use_get` (String)
- `check_use_http11` (Boolean)
- `chk_interval` (Number)
- `chk_retry_count` (Number)
- `chk_timeout` (Number)
- `conns_per_sec_limit` (Number)
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `enhanced_health_checks` (Boolean)
- `esp_allowed_directories` (String)
- `esp_allowed_hosts` (String)
- `esp_display_pub_priv` (Boolean)
- `esp_enabled` (Boolean)
- `esp_include_nested_groups` (Boolean)
- `esp_input_auth_mode` (String)
- `esp_logs` (Boolean)
- `esp_output_auth_mode` (String)
- `force_l7` (Boolean)
- `idletime` (Number)
- `match_len` (Number)
- `max_conns_limit` (Number)
- `need_host_name` (Boolean)
- `nickname` (String)
- `persist_timeout` (String)
- `port` (String)
- `protocol` (String)
- `requests_per_sec_limit` (Number)
- `schedule` (String)
- `ssl_acceleration` (Boolean)
- `type` (String)
- `waf_alert_threshold` (Number)
- `waf_blocking_paranoia` (Number)
- `waf_intercept_mode` (String)
